item.title: Vestel Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Vestel Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsFebruary 17, 2026Vestel Electronics Industry & Trade Co.is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for Vestel-owned brands and products only.

item.title: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on January 21 Now Available
item.description: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on January 21 Now AvailablenewsFebruary 24, 2026TheCVE Boardheld a teleconference meeting on January 21, 2026. Read themeeting minutes summary.

item.title: JupiterOne Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: JupiterOne Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsFebruary 24, 2026JupiterOne, Inc.is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for all JupiterOne open source and commercial products.

item.title: CVE Program Report for Quarter 4 Calendar Year (Q4 CY) 2025
item.description: CVE Program Report for Quarter 4 Calendar Year (Q4 CY) 2025blogBy CVE Program|March 3, 2026The CVE Program’s quarterly summary of program milestones and metrics for Q4 CY 2025.

item.title: Vulnerability Data Enrichment for CVE Records: 259 CNAs on the Enrichment Recognition List for March 2, 2026
item.description: Vulnerability Data Enrichment for CVE Records: 259 CNAs on the Enrichment Recognition List for March 2, 2026blogBy CVE Program|March 3, 2026

item.title: Cygence Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Cygence Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMarch 3, 2026Cygence Pty Ltdis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for issues in third-party products identified by or reported to Cygence, unless covered by the scope of another CNA.

item.title: Turan Security Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Turan Security Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMarch 3, 2026Turan Securityis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities discovered through independent research conducted by TuranSec to products and projects that are not CNAs themselves.

item.title: Full Agenda Now Available forCVE/FIRST VulnCon 2026on April 13-16, 2026!
item.description: Full Agenda Now Available forCVE/FIRST VulnCon 2026on April 13-16, 2026!blogBy CVE Program|March 10, 2026CVE/FIRST VulnCon 2026

item.title: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on February 4 Now Available
item.description: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on February 4 Now AvailablenewsMarch 17, 2026TheCVE Boardheld a teleconference meeting on February 4, 2026. Read themeeting minutes summary.

item.title: Bombadil Systems Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Bombadil Systems Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMarch 17, 2026Bombadil Systems LLCis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities in third-party software discovered by Bombadil Systems that are not in another CNA’s scope.
